name: ConnectionBase.SecondaryType
summary: Defines how many secondaries a connection can have.

enum_values.name: SECONDARYTYPE_ZERO
enum_values.summary: The connection can have zero secondaries. Zero secondaries means that the connection is a detail.

enum_values.name: SECONDARYTYPE_ONE
enum_values.summary: The connection can have one secondary.

enum_values.name: SECONDARYTYPE_TWO
enum_values.summary: The connection can have two secondaries.

enum_values.name: SECONDARYTYPE_MULTIPLE
enum_values.summary: The connection can have multiple secondaries.
